center.name: 科托帕希省
center.summary: 科托帕希省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括敏雀霸鶲、Moustached antpitta、Rufous spinetail，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: andaquiensis is found in the upper Magdalena River Valley in Colombia and on both slopes of the Andes in Ecuador as far south as Cotopaxi and Napo provinces

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in all three ranges of the Colombian Andes, on the west slope of Ecuador's Andes as far south as Cotopaxi Province, and on the east slope through Ecuador into extreme northern Peru north of the Marañón River

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Andes of the western Venezuelan states of Mérida (state) and Táchira, in Colombia's Central and Eastern Andes, and in Ecuador 's Andes south to Cotopaxi Province on the west side and to northeastern Loja Province in the east
